summary: Both features verified: 1) Inactive Customers ratio shows 'X out of Y customers' and updates dynamically when days threshold changes, 2) New reference-breakdown endpoint with multi-select chips, combined summary, chart with legend, and per-reference table

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height (-1) - cosmetic issue in Recharts library when tabs switch. Not blocking.

passed_tests: Feature 1: Inactive Customers 'X out of Y customers' text displayed (data-testid='inactive-ratio')
Feature 1: Ratio updates dynamically - 30 days: '0 out of 23', 15 days: '15 out of 23', 1 day: '23 out of 23'
Feature 2: GET /api/analytics/reference-breakdown?references=Instagram returns gold_total, diamond_total, total, bills, customers
Feature 2: Instagram breakdown: gold_total=204282.61, diamond_total=0, total=210411.09, bills=3, customers=1
Feature 2: Multi-reference: returns combined totals + per-reference breakdown array
Feature 2: Empty references returns zeroed combined object
Feature 2: Reference chips toggleable - ref-chip-Instagram, ref-chip-Repeat Customer
Feature 2: ref-combined-summary appears when 2+ refs selected
Feature 2: Chart shows gold_total and diamond_total bars per reference with legend
Feature 2: Table shows REFERENCE, GOLD SALES, DIAMOND SALES, TOTAL, BILLS, CUSTOMERS columns
Feature 2: Placeholder text shows when no refs selected
API auth: /api/analytics/reference-breakdown requires authentication (401 without token)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1323-1398: /api/analytics/reference-breakdown endpoint correctly filters by approved/sent/edited status and returns per-ref + combined summaries
server.py lines 1573-1579: /api/analytics/customers/inactive returns inactive_count and total_customers fields for ratio display
Reports.js line 829: inactive-ratio span correctly displays '{inactive_count} out of {total_customers} customers'
Reports.js lines 548-656: Gold vs Diamond breakdown card with multi-select chips, combined summary, chart, and table

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features fully verified: 1) Inactive customers ratio dynamically updates - 0/23 at 30d, 15/23 at 15d, 23/23 at 1d. 2) Reference breakdown shows Instagram with ₹2,04,283 gold / ₹0 diamond / 3 bills / 1 customer. Repeat Customer has 0 approved bills so shows no data in breakdown (1 draft bill only). Multi-select works, combined summary appears when 2+ refs selected.

reference_breakdown_ui.chart_type: BarChart with gold_total and diamond_total bars
reference_breakdown_ui.placeholder_text: Select one or more references above to see gold vs diamond breakdown

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual delivery
